name: allergy
title: best herbal teas for allergy
description: Matricaria chamomilla tea contains bioactive constituents such as apigenin, luteolin, and flavonoids that help to treat allergic reactions by reducing inflammation and modulating the immune system. The anti-inflammatory and antihistamine properties of this herbal tea help to alleviate symptoms of allergies, such as itching, redness, and swelling.
